title: TechNova Return & Refund Policy
content:
## TechNova Return & Refund Policy

### 30-Day Return Window
You may return most items within **30 days of delivery** for a full refund or exchange.

### Conditions for Return:
- Item must be in its **original packaging** with all accessories included.
- Item must be **unused and undamaged** (for non-defective returns).
- Proof of purchase (order number or receipt) is required.

### Return Shipping:
- **Defective/damaged items:** TechNova provides a **free prepaid return label**.
- **Changed mind / no longer needed:** Customer is responsible for return shipping costs.
- **Wrong item received:** TechNova provides a **free prepaid return label** and expedited replacement.

### Refund Processing:
- Refunds are processed within **5-7 business days** after we receive and inspect the returned item.
- Refund is issued to the **original payment method**.
- Shipping charges are non-refundable (except for defective/wrong items).

### Non-Returnable Items:
- Items returned after 30 days.
- Items without original packaging or with missing accessories.
- Items with physical damage caused by the customer (drops, water damage beyond rated resistance, etc.).
- Gift cards.

### How to Initiate a Return:
1. Contact our support team or use the AI assistant to create a return ticket.
2. You will receive a Return Authorization (RA) number and instructions.
3. Ship the item back within 7 days of receiving the RA number.
4. Once received and inspected, your refund will be processed.

### Exchanges:
We offer direct exchanges for the same product (different color/size if available). For a different product, please return the original item and place a new order.
